steps.title: Let's build a Word Cloud slide!
steps.description: A Word Cloud slide lets participants submit short words or phrases, and displays all responses on one screen — the most popular answer grows largest and sits at the centre of the cloud. We'll set one up together in under a minute. Click Next to begin.

steps.title: Create a new presentation
steps.description: Click 'New Presentation' to open a fresh deck.

steps.title: Pick the Word Cloud slide type
steps.description: Select 'Word Cloud' from the slide type picker. You'll find it in the Interactive section — it's the one that turns audience responses into a live, growing cloud of words.

steps.title: Write your question
steps.description: Type the prompt your audience will respond to. A short, open-ended question works best — something like 'Describe today's vibe in one word'.

action.value: Describe today's vibe in one word

steps.title: Set entries per participant
steps.description: Choose how many words each participant can submit — from 1 to 10. The default of 3 works well for most sessions, giving everyone enough voice without flooding the cloud.

steps.title: Preview your Word Cloud
steps.description: Click Preview to see how the cloud looks to your audience. Words appear as participants submit them, with the most popular growing largest and sitting right at the centre.

steps.title: This is your audience's phone
steps.description: In the participant screen on the right, audience members type their words and tap Submit. Watch the cloud respond in real time on the presenter screen.

previewInteractions.label: type word 2 — amazing (repeat for larger cloud size)

steps.title: The cloud builds in real time
steps.description: Every word lands in the cloud the moment it's submitted — the most popular grows biggest and moves to the centre. No two sessions look the same.

steps.title: Back to the editor
steps.description: Exit preview and head back to the editor to fine-tune your settings.

action.hint: Click Back to editor to continue

steps.title: Ready to go live!
steps.description: That's your Word Cloud slide set up. When you're ready, hit 'Present' — participants join on their phones and start submitting. The cloud builds in real time right in front of the whole room.
